title: cupania rotundifolia
intro: Cupania rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved cupania, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It is a small shrub or tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cupania rotundifolia include its potential to treat fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Cupania rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
